dialogos.texto_en: Wow, the night view is beautiful!
Yeah, it definitely lives up to its expectations.
But I'm not really in the mood to relax and enjoy it.
Yes.\nWe were talking about how\nsomething's off with Miku%p-2;――
No doubt, now that I think back on what Ichika and the others\nhave said, there was definitely something off about her.
What's Miku doing?
She's curled up inside the bed in our room.\nShe seems to be absent-minded\nno matter what we say to her.
So even if we're all gathered here like this,\nshe probably won't notice us.
Ah, but what about Uesugi-kun?\nIs there a possibility he might come here...?
It's okay.\nI asked Raiha-chan not to let him out of his room.
Raiha-chan also thought that something was strange\nabout how Miku was acting.\nI'm glad we are on the same page.
Hey, didn't Uesugi-san also seem troubled by Miku?
Yeah, it seemed that way.
Then it's unlikely that Uesugi-san\ndid something to upset her, right?
I don't know. Knowing Fu-kun, he might be unaware\nthat he did something to upset her.
That actually seems more likely.
Ahaha...\nFutaro-kun has an unusual kind of credibility, huh?
His lack of delicacy is really frustrating though.\nMaybe he did something\nthat made Miku want to avoid him.
But he wasn't like this\nbefore we came to Okinawa, was he?
From the time we've gathered and got on the plane today,\nwe've been together the entire time...
If Uesugi-san did something,\nwe would have noticed it too.
Well, ideally, we'd like Futaro-kun,\nher boyfriend, to make the first move,\nbut based on his behavior earlier, I don't know.
That's right.\nThose two are dating, right?
Huh?
Don't tell me you're still bothered by the fact you weren't chosen, after all this time...?
I'm not saying that.
The fact is that she confessed to Fu-kun,\nand he answered back to her. That's undeniable.
That's true.\nOut of all of us, Miku was trying the most to win over his heart.
Yeah, Miku is amazing.
Yes.
That being said!
In the past six months,\nI'm not the only one who has started to doubt\nwhether those two are really dating, right?
Ahhh...\nWell, maybe a little?
But Futaro-kun had his exams which he had to worry about,\nand he was also helping us with our studies.
As for Miku, she was probably trying to be considerate.
Well, the exams are over now. We're finally graduating\nand going on a celebratory trip.\nPlus, it's their first trip together as a couple!
Shouldn't she want to say things like\n'I want to be with Fu-kun more' or\n'I don't want to be in a different room than him.'
Th-that's not allowed!\nHaving a boy and girl in the same room\nwould make our mother sad!!!
Of course, we'd stop them if she actually says that.\nBut she hasn't, and why is she avoiding Fu-kun like that?
Hmmm. Maybe%p-2;――
Maybe Miku's being considerate because\nthis is a trip for everyone,\nnot just for Uesugi-san and her.
That could be possible.
But why does she need to do that...?
Then, ask her that, maybe?
Mmmh...
Well, I don't really care about her love life,\nand I don't plan on getting in the way either.
I seeee.\nA girl's heart is complex, indeed.
What's with that cute smile?!
Even if we tell Miku she doesn't have to\nhold back or anything,\nI'm sure she'll still be concerned.
And this isn't just Miku's problem, is it?
Huh?
We can't rule out the possibility\nthat Uesugi-kun might be the one who caused this.
Considering his behavior when we arrived in Okinawa,\nhe seemed to be getting carried away by the excitement too.
Yeeaah...\nit's easy to get carried away with travel excitement.
We might need to confirm this.
